description:
Weekly Monday 8 AM PHT cron whose script gates internally on "is this
the LAST Monday of the month?" — so the digest fires once per month.
Loops per res.company (multi-company branding) and emails the HR
Manager group (hr.group_hr_manager) a 5-section monthly digest for
the FOLLOWING month: birthdays, work-anniversary milestones, expiring
contracts (with red highlight for first-half-of-month expirations),
public holidays, headcount-by-department.

Refactored from action_monthly_hr_digest.py: replaced the
sort(key=lambda) calls and the `[e for e in expiring if ...]` comp
that captured midpoint with plain tuple-sort and an explicit
early_count counter. No closures.

Model is hr.employee, not hr.applicant. Recipient group is
hr.group_hr_manager (not hr_recruitment.group_hr_recruitment_manager).
